About Me

Hey, I'm Irfan Munir — a Computer Science student with a deep passion for cybersecurity, ethical hacking, and the future of AI-powered technology.

I explore the intersection of offensive security and intelligent systems — building tools that defend, detect, and disrupt vulnerabilities before bad actors can exploit them.

Currently focused on completing my Bachelor's in Computer Science while expanding into hands-on penetration testing, network security, and real-world cybersecurity projects that make digital spaces safer.

When I'm not studying vulnerabilities, I'm building projects, exploring AI research, and constantly leveling up my skills in this ever-evolving field.

Ethical Hacking Network Security Python Scripting C++ Linux / Kali AI & ML Penetration Testing Google Certified
